name: MD. RAKIB TROFDER
title: Lecturer, Department of Computer Science and Engineering

achievements: Achivement: 1st Runner-up, BUET CSE Fest Hackathon, 2023

professional_experience.company: Bangladesh Army University of Science and Technology
responsibilities: Conducting lectures and laboratory sessions for undergraduate courses in Computer Science.
Mentoring students in research projects and academic development.
Contributing to curriculum development and departmental activities.
Developed microservice-based web application for monitoring and evaluation systems using Angular, ASP.NET, and Python.
Developed end-to-end AI agent solutions leveraging the Gemini API.
Restructured on-prem server infrastructure and implemented a fully automated CI/CD pipeline.
Architected data infrastructure for geospatial data and processed large-scale satellite datasets for agro decision-making.
Analyzed and reconstructed existing software structures to create detailed datasets.
Evaluated performance of reconstruction tools and studied limitations of LLMs in software reconstruction.
Designed and built an in-house social media platform from prototype to deployment.
Completed intensive training in core web development.
